name: agent-issue-tracker
description: Portable issue-tracking skills + slash commands for Claude Code, with GitHub and Jira backends. Bundles six skills (bug-tracking, feature-request, followup-tracking, initiative-tracking, skill-currency, tracker-contribute), three slash commands (/tracker-init, /tracker-doctor, /resume-initiative), and a backend interface contract with implementations for the gh CLI and the Atlassian Remote MCP.
